{"query":"Netanyahu lobby Trump joint military offensive Iran February 2026 regime change","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1675,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regime_change_efforts_in_the_2026_Iran_war","title":"Regime change efforts in the 2026 Iran war - Wikipedia","content":"In the lead-up to the beginning of the Iran war on 28 February 2026, David Barnea devised a plan to overthrow the Islamic Republic of Iran by galvanizing the Iranian opposition after several days of U.S.–Israeli strikes and assassinations, prompting them to riot and rebel against the government, leading to its collapse.
The plan was presented to Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, who adopted the plan.
On 28 February 2026, the United States and Israel launched attacks on various Iranian military sites and leaders, which included the assassination of the Supreme Leader of Iran, Ali Khamenei.
Among the plans to bring about regime change was militarily supporting and instigating an Iranian Kurdish offensive into Iran.
Trump admitted to covertly arming Iranian Kurdish rebellion groups before the war was launched on 28 February 2026.
Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, Keir Starmer, defended his initial decision to not permit the use of British bases for strikes on Iran, asserting that his government "does not believe in regime change from the skies."
An Ipsos survey from March 2026 revealed that 61% of Canadians disapproved of the unilateral American and Israeli aggression in Iran, with 42% strongly disapproving of the strikes.

Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the goal of the joint U.S.-Israeli attack is to “remove the existential threat posed by the terrorist regime in Iran.”
“Our joint action will create the conditions for the brave Iranian people to take their destiny into their own hands,” Netanyahu said in a video.
A person briefed on the operation told NPR it was expected to last a few days, with Israel’s military focusing on targeting Iran’s missile program."},{"url":"https://english.aawsat.com/world/5240703-trump-says-iran-regime-change-could-be-best-thing","title":"Trump Says Iran Regime Change Could Be 'Best Thing'","content":"WEST PALM BEACH, FLORIDA - FEBRUARY 13: US President Donald Trump gestures to members of the media after exiting Air Force One at Palm Beach International Airport on February 13, 2026 in West Palm Beach, Florida.
The source said Witkoff and Kushner will also meet officials from Russia and Ukraine on Tuesday in Geneva in the US drive to bring an end to the war in Ukraine.
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and French President Emmanuel Macron met as part of a regular series of joint cabinet meetings, looking to get past tensions over the collapse of a much-touted joint fighter jet project earlier this year."},{"url":"https://newrepublic.com/article/204991/netanyahu-trump-iran-regime-change","title":"Netanyahu Is Trying to Drag Trump Into Changing Another Regime: Iran’s | The New Republic","content":"In exchange, the prime minister said, Israel would end the war in Gaza.

There’s an argument flooding the media zone since the beginning of the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is responsible for pushing U.S. President Donald Trump to attack Iran.
